ModMetadata.Name: Force Field Door Mod Fix
ModMetadata.Author: SixFive7
ModMetadata.Description:
[h1]Force Field Door Mod Fix[/h1]
A temporary compatibility fix that keeps ForceFieldDoorMod working on current Stationeers builds until its author updates it.
Full multiplayer compatibility. Safe to add to and remove from existing savegames.
[h2]What this fixes[/h2]
ForceFieldDoorMod (by WIKUS and BoNes) was built against an older Stationeers build. On 0.2.6403 and later the game removed the one-argument GridController.CanContainAtmos method the mod's door calls every atmospheric tick. On any world that contains a force field door the game then throws a MissingMethodException every simulation tick and the whole simulation stops. This mod restores the door's behaviour without editing ForceFieldDoorMod's files.
[h2]How it works[/h2]
At load it checks whether ForceFieldDoorMod is present and still affected. If so, it takes over the force field door's atmospheric tick and runs a corrected version that calls the current two-argument CanContainAtmos overload, so the door keeps its variable power draw and the simulation keeps running. It never modifies ForceFieldDoorMod on disk.
[h2]This is a temporary shim[/h2]
It exists only until ForceFieldDoorMod itself is updated. Once the original ships a fix, this mod detects it and stands down on its own, and you can safely unsubscribe. If ForceFieldDoorMod is not installed, this mod does nothing.
[h2]Compatibility[/h2]
[b]Requires:[/b] [list] [*][url=https://docs.bepinex.dev/]BepInEx[/url] [*][url=https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad]StationeersLaunchPad[/url] [*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3328065049]ForceFieldDoorMod[/url] (the mod this fix keeps working) [/list]
[b]All players[/b] on a server should run the same setup. Dedicated servers need it installed server-side too. There are no settings.
[h2]Reporting Issues[/h2] If you run into a bug or something behaves unexpectedly, please open an issue on [url=https://github.com/SixFive7/StationeersPlus/issues]GitHub[/url]. Please include the mod name in the title so reports can be triaged. Steam comment notifications don't always come through, so GitHub is the reliable way to make sure a report is seen.
[h2]Credits[/h2] [list] [*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3328065049]ForceFieldDoorMod[/url] by WIKUS and BoNes: the original mod this fix keeps working. All credit for the force field door itself belongs to them. [/list]
[url=https://github.com/SixFive7/StationeersPlus/tree/master/Mods/ForceFieldDoorModFix]Source Code on GitHub[/url]
[h2]License[/h2] Licensed under the [url=https://github.com/SixFive7/StationeersPlus/blob/master/LICENSE]Apache License 2.0[/url]. Attribution required; see the LICENSE and NOTICE files at the repository root.
ModMetadata.ChangeLog: v0.1.0: Initial release - Keeps ForceFieldDoorMod (Steam Workshop 3328065049) working on Stationeers 0.2.6403 and later, where the removed one-argument GridController.CanContainAtmos(WorldGrid) call in its force field door crashed the simulation every atmospheric tick. - Takes over the force field door's atmospheric tick and runs a corrected version using the current two-argument CanContainAtmos overload, preserving the door's variable power draw. - Never edits ForceFieldDoorMod on disk. Does nothing if the mod is absent or has already been updated.
ModMetadata.InGameDescription: Force Field Door Mod Fix A temporary compatibility fix that keeps ForceFieldDoorMod working on current Stationeers builds until its author updates it. Full multiplayer compatibility. Safe to add to and remove from existing savegames. What it does: - ForceFieldDoorMod crashes the simulation every tick on 0.2.6403+ (a removed CanContainAtmos overload). - This shim takes over the door's atmospheric tick with a corrected version, so the sim keeps running. - Stands down automatically once ForceFieldDoorMod is updated; does nothing if it is absent. Requires: BepInEx + StationeersLaunchPad + ForceFieldDoorMod. No settings. Credits: ForceFieldDoorMod by WIKUS and BoNes (Workshop 3328065049).
